cuisine: Global food: Chinatown, Little Italy, Jackson Heights

fly: JFK, LGA, EWR — choose based on where you’re staying
train: Amtrak to Penn Station (NYC) and Newark Penn (NJ)
drive: Parking is expensive — consider transit + rideshare

weather.climate_summary: Four seasons. Winters can be windy/cold; summers are hot and humid. Spring/Fall are the easiest for walking-heavy itineraries.
